str.authority: Conselho de Controle de Atividades Financeiras (COAF)
str.notes: Suspicious activity reports (comunicações de operações suspeitas) must be filed within 24 hours. VASPs are obliged entities under Law 9,613/1998. Receita Federal also requires monthly reporting of all crypto transactions via IN 1,888/2019. Filed via COAF's SISCOAF portal.

ctr.authority: Conselho de Controle de Atividades Financeiras (COAF)
ctr.notes: Automatic communication required for cash transactions of BRL 50,000 or more, or any transaction pattern suggesting structuring. Filed under COAF Resolution 40/2021.
